# Postmortem: {{Incident Title}}

- **Date of incident:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Duration:** HH:MM (start) → HH:MM (end)
- **Severity:** SEV-1 | SEV-2 | SEV-3
- **Author:** name
- **Reviewed by:** names

## Summary

One paragraph. What happened, what broke, who was affected, how long.

## Impact

- Customer-facing impact (events, users, $).
- Internal impact (on-call load, cascading failures).

## Timeline

All times in UTC.

| Time | Event | Evidence |
| ---- | ----- | -------- |
|      |       |          |

## Root cause

Explain the *cause*, not just the symptom. What invariant broke, and why
did the system allow it?

## Trigger

What specifically set this incident in motion?

## Resolution

How it was mitigated. How it was fixed. Whether the fix is durable.
